titleStmt.title: SII 16.294: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 294. (A.R. No. 266 of 1916.) ŚRĪMUSHṆAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the first prākāra in the Bhūvarāha-perumāḷ temple.
This is dated Śaka 1505, Svabhānu, Māgha śu. 3, corresponding to 1584 A.D., January 6, (Monday).

It records that Koṇḍama-nāyaka, son of Kṛishṇappa-nāyaka of Kāśyapa-gōtra remitted the Jōḍi and birāḍa taxes on the 38 villages (specified) situated in his nāyaṅkara of Bhōnagiripaṭṇam-sīma and endowed to the temple of Ādivarāha-Perumāḷ at Śrī-mushṇam on the representation of Achyutappa-nāyaka, son of Bayyappa-nāyaka, who is stated to have built gōpuras, prākāras and maṇḍapas for the god and tanks and canals in the (endowed) villages thus increasing the temple's revenue with which he is said to have provided ornaments to the god, for which act he was granted a fourth share heriditarily in the offerings made to the deity.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1505 Agunēṭi svakhāma saṁvatsara māgha śu 3 lū śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra śrīraṁgarāyadēvamahārāyaluṁgāru penugoṁḍa nagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhāsanā rūḍhulai
pṛthvīsāmrājyaṁ śēyucunuṁḍaṁgānu kāsyapagōtraṁ kṛiṣṇappanāyanigāri putṛulu koṁḍamanāyanigāru . bayyapanāyanigāri putṛulu Acyutappanāyanigāriki yiccina śāsanakramameṭlannanu . mā nāyaṁkarānaku naḍacē bhōnagiripaṭnaṁsīmalōni śrīmuṣṇaṁ Ādivarāhaperumāḷla grāmālaku
nagari jōḍi virāḍālu mānavalenani mīru māku telupukoni sarvamānyaṁ śēyiṁcinavi . tirumuṭṭaṁ . puttūru . kaḷakuḍi . śailaguḍi . kāriguḍi . vallaṁ . śirāman nāgaṁbaṁdalu . guṇamaṁgalaṁ . yaḷamaṁgalaṁ . pūṁḍi . kōlavarāhanellūru . rāyaṁ gōḍi . puḷiyaṁguḍi .
kulutaṁgāvan® . kārimāṁguḍi . cekramaṁgalaṁ . kiṇanūru . tirukunaṁ . nedhaveli . piḷla yāṁḍāṁgalu . vuḷuttukuppa . kiḷānallūru . paṇayaṁbaligaṁ . tagaraṁ . koḍiyālaṁ . grāmālakunnu vaḍlaguḍi . kaḍukāmaraṁ . kurucci . nāgaṁguḍi grāmālu 4 ki
perumāḷlakōvila saṁmaṁdhaṁ sagamaṭikinni . vuḷlaḍalu paṇnipaḷlaṁ . veḷayamādēvi tirumāle puraṁ . maruṁgūri tōṁpu . kāvunūri tōṁpu . yeḷekālu maḍugu . yeddupaṭṭu Āyaṁ . yaṭṭitora . vuḷūri tōṁpu modalainavi sarvamānyaṁ śēyiṁci
perumāḷaku gōpura prākāramaṁḍapālu gāviṁcci grāmālaku ceruvulu kuṁṭalu kāluvalu tavviṁci marinni Adhikamaina svāstyāluśēśi tiruvābharaṇaṁ modalaina sakalavidha kaiṁkaryā lunnu mī vubhayaṁgā kaṭṭaḍaśēśināru
ganaka . perumāḷlu Āragiṁcina padā¨rthālu Anniṭānnu cetu¨rthāṁśaṁ viṭṭavanviḷukāḍu mīku kaṭṭaḍaśēstimi ganaka . yī svāmya svada(ta)ṁtrālu mīru dīsikoni mīputrapautra pāraṁparyaṁgānu dānādi vinumaya vikraya yōgyamavunaṭṭugānu
Āceṁdrā¨rkasthāyigānu Anubhaviṁcagalavāru Ani yiccina śāsanamu .
Digital edition of SII 16.294 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
